name: Encased Magma Longbow
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health. This bonus decrease relative to your missing health. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2.5% Combat Advantage. Tank: +2.5% Defense. Healer: +2.5% Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When on a fire-themed map, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.
notes: Forged in the heart of Mount Hotenow

name: Encased Magma Knives
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health. This bonus decrease relative to your missing health. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2.5% Combat Advantage. Tank: +2.5% Defense. Healer: +2.5% Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When on a fire-themed map, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.
notes: Liquid magma covers the business end of this powerful weapon

equipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max Stacks: 10.

equipBonuses.name: Fiery Predator
equipBonuses.description: +4% Damage on fire-themed maps. +1% Damage on other maps.

equipBonuses.name: Ruthless Advantage
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Accuracy and Combat Advantage for 15 seconds. (Max stack 5).

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Precision
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Strike is increased by 1.5% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max 10 Stacks: 8% Combat Advantage.

equipBonuses.name: Fiery Predator
equipBonuses.description: +3.5% Damage on fire-themed maps. +1% Damage on other maps.

equipBonuses.name: Ruthless Might
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity.

equipBonuses.name: Enveloped Precision
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Strike is increased by 1.3% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 6.5% Critical Strike.

name: Starcore Knives
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the above bonuses are doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the above bonuses are doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

name: Starcore Knives +1
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing.

name: Solarium Longbow +1
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing.

name: Xaryxian Knives
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 3% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you will gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you will lose a stack of Darklight. Based on your role, each stack of Darklight will grant the following bonus: DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -0.4% Incoming Damage. Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Max 10 stacks. Stack bonuses are doubled in Wildspace.

name: Xaryxian Longbow
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 3% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you will gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you will lose a stack of Darklight. Based on your role, each stack of Darklight will grant the following bonus: DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -0.4% Incoming Damage. Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing.
notes: Forged from the remnants of a dying star

setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 3% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Each stack of Darklight: DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -0.6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Max 10 stacks.

notes: Forged in the heart of a dying star

Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

equipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max Stacks: 10.

equipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Precision
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Critical Strike is increased by 1.5% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Predator
equipBonuses.description: +7% Damage in Wildspace. +2% Damage in non-Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Grace
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat in Wildspace, you gain 0.85% Forte. Max Stacks: 7 (10 in Wildspace).

equipBonuses.name: Shielded Strength
equipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP in Wildspace, gain 5% Damage and 2.5% Critical Severity. In non-Wildspace, the Damage bonus is reduced to 2%.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Presence
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, every 2 seconds you gain 875 Power and 0.5% Critical Strike. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 4,375 Power and 2.5% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Precision
equipBonuses.description: +7.5% Critical Strike in Wildspace. +3% Critical Strike in non-Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Maximized Opportunity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Combat Advantage is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
equipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown).

equipBonuses.name: Butcher's Zeal
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 10 Action Points. Can only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Hunter
equipBonuses.description: +5% Damage in Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Grace
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Forte increases by 7.5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Defender Strike
equipBonuses.description: Gain -1% Incoming Damage when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain 1% Base Damage Boost per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

equipBonuses.name: Escalating Torrent
equipBonuses.description: Gain 400 Power for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Stacks 20 times.

equipBonuses.name: Tenacious Luck
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Critical Strike is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Brutality
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, you gain a stack of Reckless Brutality, increasing your Power by 2000 but increasing your damage taken by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Death Defying Advantage
equipBonuses.description: Gain 2% Combat Advantage for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. (Max of 10 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Furor
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to 20% bonus Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: 0 Damage (100%). Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to -9% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: -0% Incoming Damage. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Might
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 7500 Power for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Charged Focus
equipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Critical Severity is increased by 5000.

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Ferocity
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Critical Severity increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 650 Combat Advantage, to the max of 7800.

name: Perfect Reach of Lolth
setBonus: 2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 3%. Your incoming damage is reduced by up to 7.5% when your Stamina is empty. At the start of Combat, your Critical Strike and Critical Severity increase by 1%. For every 5 seconds you are in combat, these increase by 1%. (Maximum 5% bonus).

name: Perfect Blades of Lolth
setBonus: 2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 3%. Your incoming damage is reduced by up to 7.5% when your Stamina is empty. At the start of Combat, your Critical Strike and Critical Severity increase by 1%. For every 5 seconds you are in combat, these increase by 1%. (Maximum 5% bonus).

name: Duergar Mercenary's Steel Bow
setBonus: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted the following: +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, -2% Incoming Damage. This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of Duergar weapons.

name: Duergar Mercenary's Steel Picks
setBonus: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted the following: +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, -2% Incoming Damage. This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of Duergar weapons.

name: The Weaver's Longbow
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You and nearby allies are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -2% Incoming Damage. Healer: +2% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons. When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.
notes: This longbow radiates a powerful dimming aura

name: The Weaver's Knives
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You and nearby allies are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -2% Incoming Damage. Healer: +2% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons. When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.
